# pexip_infinity_user_group_entity_mapping (Resource)

Manages a user group entity mapping configuration with the Infinity service. User group entity mappings define relationships between user groups and system entities for access control and permissions.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_user_group_entity_mapping" "example" {
  entity_resource_uri = pexip_infinity_conference.example.id
  user_group          = pexip_infinity_user_group.example.id
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `entity_resource_uri` (String) The entity resource URI that this mapping applies to. This should be a valid resource URI in the system.
- `user_group` (String) The user group that should be mapped to the entity. This should be a valid user group URI or identifier.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the user group entity mapping. Maximum length: 500 characters.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the user group entity mapping in Infinity
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the user group entity mapping in Infinity
